pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh lines 77-80 and task.json line 18. The concept is explicitly created using create_concept('Electrolytes Panel', CLASS_CONVSET, DATATYPE_NA, is_set=True) via OpenMRS REST API.

Verified via setup_task.sh lines 68-71 and task.json line 19. The concept is explicitly created using create_concept('Serum Magnesium', CLASS_TEST, DATATYPE_NUMERIC, is_set=False) via OpenMRS REST API.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on two medical concepts in Bahmni/OpenMRS: 'Serum Magnesium' (a numeric test concept) and 'Electrolytes Panel' (a concept set). Both concepts are synthetic and created programmatically during task setup via the OpenMRS REST API using standard CIEL datatype and class UUIDs. The task requires adding Serum Magnesium as a set member to Electrolytes Panel. No external datasets or real-world data sources are involved.
